message.content:
@startuml
participant "GridSingleSelectCell" as GSCC
participant "SelectOptionCellEditor" as SCEE
participant "SelectOptionCellEditorBloc" as SCEEBloc
participant "SelectOptionService" as SOSP
participant "GridSelectOptionCellController" as GSCC

GSCC ..> SCEE
SCEE ..> SCEEBloc
SCEEBloc ..> SOSP
SCEEBloc ..> GSCC

style GSCC fill:#d4edda,stroke:#28a745,stroke-width:2px
style SCEE fill:#d4edda,stroke:#28a745,stroke-width:2px
style SCEEBloc fill:#d4edda,stroke:#28a745,stroke-width:2px
style SOSP fill:#d4edda,stroke:#28a745,stroke-width:2px
style GSCC fill:#d4edda,stroke:#28a745,stroke-width:2px

style GSCC circle
style SCEE circle
style SCEEBloc circle
style SOSP circle
style GSCC circle
@enduml
